overview.description: The RCN Pareto Strategic Allocation ETF (PRTO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of multiple asset classes. Investment allocation is based on trend-following and momentum signals inspired by the Pareto principle. PRTO was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by Pareto.
